references.title: Follower growth
references.description: The graph describes the evolution of the page's followers

references.title: Page reach evolution
references.description: The graph shows the evolution of the page's total, organic, and paid reach. Organic reach is calculated by subtracting total reach from paid reach.

references.title: Sum of Daily Page Reach
references.description: Sum of the unique daily reach of your page or about it. If a user saw content on your page on two different days, it will be counted twice. This includes posts, check-ins, ads, social information about people who interacted with your page, for example. This metric is an approximate value.

references.title: Total Page Reach
references.description: The number of unique accounts that viewed your content (posts, stories, ads) at least once. This also includes reach from other sources, such as tags, check-ins, and Page or profile visits. This data is estimated and Facebook reports it for intervals of up to 90 days. For longer intervals, we recommend adding the "Sum of Daily Page Reach" metric.

references.title: Total Media Views
references.description: The number of times any content from your Page or about your Page entered a person's screen. This includes posts, stories, ads, as well other content or information on your Page.

references.title: Posts Count
references.description: Total number of posts on your page in the analyzed period.

references.title: Post engagement
references.description: The number of times people engaged with your posts during the reporting period, regardless of when they were posted, through reactions, comments, shares, and more.

references.title: Post engagement rate
references.description: The engagement rate for Facebook posts is determined by dividing the total engagement of the post by the total number of impressions of the post, multiplied by 100. This takes into account the results of any post in the selected analysis period, regardless of the date it was published. This engagement covers all interactions people have with your ads and posts while they are being displayed. It can involve actions such as reactions, comments, shares, offer redemptions, photo or video views, or link clicks.

references.title: Best day for posts
references.description: This chart shows which day performed best considering the Impressions of posts on your Facebook Page.

references.title: Reels Views
references.description: The number of times your videos were viewed during the analyzed period, regardless of whether the content was published for at least 3 seconds or nearly its full duration if it is shorter than 3 seconds. This value counts each video view and excludes replays.

references.title: Organic Reels views
references.description: The number of times your videos were viewed during the analyzed period, regardless of when the content was published, through organic reach, for at least 3 seconds or almost their total duration if they are shorter than 3 seconds. This value counts each view of a video and excludes replays.

references.title: Paid views of Reels
references.description: The number of times your promoted videos were viewed during the analyzed period, regardless of when the content was published, for at least 3 seconds or for almost their entire duration if they are less than 3 seconds. This value counts each view of a video and excludes replays.

references.title: Average viewing time of reels
references.description: The average play time of your video. This metric is calculated by dividing the watch time by the number of initial views. An initial view is when your video starts playing for the first time in a video session.

references.title: Total viewing time of Reels
references.description: The total number of minutes your reels have been viewed from when they were posted until the time the report is generated, including replays.

references.title: Follower growth
references.description: The graph describes the evolution of the page's followers

references.title: Page reach evolution
references.description: The graph shows the evolution of the page's total, organic, and paid reach. Organic reach is calculated by subtracting total reach from paid reach.

references.title: Sum of Daily Page Reach
references.description: Sum of the unique daily reach of your page or about it. If a user saw content on your page on two different days, it will be counted twice. This includes posts, check-ins, ads, social information about people who interacted with your page, for example. This metric is an approximate value.

references.description: The number of unique accounts that viewed your content (posts, stories, ads) at least once. This also includes reach from other sources, such as tags, check-ins, and Page or profile visits. This data is estimated and Facebook reports it for intervals of up to 90 days. For longer intervals, we recommend adding the "Sum of Daily Page Reach" metric.

references.title: Total Media Views
references.description: The number of times any content from your Page or about your Page entered a person's screen. This includes posts, stories, ads, as well other content or information on your Page.

references.title: Posts Count
references.description: Total number of posts on your page in the analyzed period.

references.title: Post engagement
references.description: The number of times people engaged with your posts during the reporting period, regardless of when they were posted, through reactions, comments, shares, and more.

references.title: Post engagement rate
references.description: The engagement rate for Facebook posts is determined by dividing the total engagement of the post by the total number of impressions of the post, multiplied by 100. This takes into account the results of any post in the selected analysis period, regardless of the date it was published. This engagement covers all interactions people have with your ads and posts while they are being displayed. It can involve actions such as reactions, comments, shares, offer redemptions, photo or video views, or link clicks.

references.title: Best day for posts
references.description: This chart shows which day performed best considering the Impressions of posts on your Facebook Page.

references.title: Reels Views
references.description: The number of times your videos were viewed during the analyzed period, regardless of whether the content was published for at least 3 seconds or nearly its full duration if it is shorter than 3 seconds. This value counts each video view and excludes replays.

references.title: Organic Reels views
references.description: The number of times your videos were viewed during the analyzed period, regardless of when the content was published, through organic reach, for at least 3 seconds or almost their total duration if they are shorter than 3 seconds. This value counts each view of a video and excludes replays.

references.title: Paid views of Reels
references.description: The number of times your promoted videos were viewed during the analyzed period, regardless of when the content was published, for at least 3 seconds or for almost their entire duration if they are less than 3 seconds. This value counts each view of a video and excludes replays.

references.title: Average viewing time of reels
references.description: The average play time of your video. This metric is calculated by dividing the watch time by the number of initial views. An initial view is when your video starts playing for the first time in a video session.

references.title: Total viewing time of Reels
references.description: The total number of minutes your reels have been viewed from when they were posted until the time the report is generated, including replays.

references.title: Total view (organic + paid)
references.description: Total number of times your content was played or viewed. Content includes reels, posts, stories, videos, live videos, and ads.

references.title: Daily reach
references.description: This graph shows the daily reach value over the analyzed period.

references.title: Profile visits
references.description: Total number of users that viewed your profile.

references.title: Followers by gender
references.description: This graph shows your followers, grouped by gender. Instagram only returns data considering the current number of followers at the time of generating the report, regardless of the period selected for analysis.

references.title: Audience by age and gender
references.description: This graph displays your audience, grouped by age and gender. Instagram only returns data considering the current number of followers at the time of generating the report, regardless of the period selected for analysis.

references.title: Followers evolution
references.description: This graph describes the evolution of the growth of followers on your profile over time. Instagram only provides follower data for periods when the integration was active with Reportei.

references.title: Variation of followers over time
references.description: This graph shows the variation in the number of followers of the account over the analyzed period. It is calculated by subtracting the previous day's estimated followers from the current day's estimated followers. And it considers both followers gained and followers lost. If all values return equal to zero, this may indicate that we do not have data for the analyzed period.

references.title: Best day for posts
references.description: This chart shows, on average, which day your followers were most active on Instagram in the last 30 days. Instagram only returns 30-day retroactive data from this chart, regardless of the period analyzed in the report.

references.title: Best time for posts
references.description: This chart shows, on average, when your followers were most active on Instagram in the last 30 days. Instagram only returns 30-day retroactive data from this chart, regardless of the period analyzed in the report. The information is being displayed in the Pacific Standard Time Zone (PST, time zone considered in this channel's API)

references.title: Stories
references.description: Stories from the analyzed period that had the greatest impact on your audience. Only shared stories from public accounts are shared. It is not possible to analyze story shares data from private accounts.

references.title: Stories count
references.description: Total number of stories posted on the analyzed period.

references.title: Total Stories Views
references.description: The number of times your stories have been viewed or played since they were posted. This metric only considers organic views.

references.title: Total Stories Impressions
references.description: Total number of times the stories in the analyzed period were viewed organically.

references.title: Retenção dos stories
references.description: A retenção representa a visualização de seus stories sem o usuário sair ou avançar para um story de uma outra conta (se avançar para o próximo story da sua própria conta, ele é considerado como retido). A média de retenção é a soma da retenção de todos os stories dividido pela quantidade total de publicações no período analisado.

references.title: Stories Total Replies
references.description: Total number of people who responded to your stories.

references.title: Taps to exit stories
references.description: Número total de vezes que os usuários clicaram  para sair dos stories.

references.title: Stories advance taps
references.description: Advance taps represent the number of times an user tapped the right side of the screen to skip to the next stories on the queue.

references.title: Stories Taps Back
references.description: Taps Back represents the number of times users clicked on the left side of the screen to go back to the previous story in the queue.

references.title: Total view (organic + paid)
references.description: Total number of times your content was played or viewed. Content includes reels, posts, stories, videos, live videos, and ads.

references.title: Daily reach
references.description: This graph shows the daily reach value over the analyzed period.

references.title: Profile visits
references.description: Total number of users that viewed your profile.

references.title: Followers by gender
references.description: This graph shows your followers, grouped by gender. Instagram only returns data considering the current number of followers at the time of generating the report, regardless of the period selected for analysis.

references.title: Audience by age and gender
references.description: This graph displays your audience, grouped by age and gender. Instagram only returns data considering the current number of followers at the time of generating the report, regardless of the period selected for analysis.

ig:stories_impressions.warning: The Story Impressions metric is only available for Stories published until 04/21/2025. For Stories after this date, Instagram switched to using the Story Views metric.

references.title: Total views
references.description: Total accumulated views of videos published during the analyzed period. Each video's view count reflects its total lifetime views since publication — not views that occurred within the period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Total likes
references.description: Total number of likes received on your account's videos during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Comments
references.description: Total number of comments received on your account's videos during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Total Shares
references.description: Total number of shares of your account's videos during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Number of Videos
references.description: Number of videos associated with your account during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Follows
references.description: Total number of followers on your account

references.title: Total views
references.description: Total accumulated views of videos published during the analyzed period. Each video's view count reflects its total lifetime views since publication — not views that occurred within the period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Total likes
references.description: Total number of likes received on your account's videos during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Comments
references.description: Total number of comments received on your account's videos during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Total Shares
references.description: Total number of shares of your account's videos during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Number of Videos
references.description: Number of videos associated with your account during the analyzed period. May include content used in ad campaigns if they also appear in TikTok Studio.

references.title: Follows
references.description: Total number of followers on your account

references.title: Views (Total)
references.description: Total number of times the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams were viewed during the reporting period.

references.title: Likes (Total)
references.description: Total number of 'likes' received on the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams during the reporting period.

references.title: Comments (Total)
references.description: Total number of comments received on the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams during the reporting period.

references.title: Shares (Total)
references.description: Total number of times the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams were shared by viewers during the reporting period.

references.title: Impressions
references.description: How many times your video thumbnails were shown to viewers. This only includes impressions on YouTube, not external websites or apps.

references.title: CTR
references.description: Views per impressions shown. It measures how often viewers watched a video after seeing an impression.

references.title: Estimated minutes watched (by day)
references.description: Total time (in hours) that viewers watched the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams.

references.title: Average view duration
references.description: The average length, in seconds, of video playbacks.

references.title: Average view percentage
references.description: Average percentage of playback of videos watched on the channel, during the analyzed period.

references.title: Subscribers gained (by day)
references.description: Total number of new subscribers acquired from the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams during the reporting period.

references.title: Subscribers Lost (Total)
references.description: Total number of subscribers who unfollowed the channel, counted from the channel's videos, shorts, or live streams during the reporting period.

references.title: Subscribers in the period
references.description: Net change in subscribers. The difference between the number of new subscribers and the number of subscribers lost in the analyzed period.

references.title: Subscribers gained by day
references.description: The difference in the total number of subscribers, as a result of subtracting the number of lost subscribers from the number of new subscribers for the analyzed period.

references.title: % Viewers by Age and Gender
references.description: This graph shows the percentage of viewers who watched the channel's videos, grouped by age and gender.

references.title: Viewer percentage by gender
references.description: This graph allows you to check the percentage of views of ad videos, grouped by genre.

references.title: Viewer percentage by age group
references.description: This graph allows you to check the percentage of views of ad videos, grouped by age group.

youtube:impressions.exception: This metric cannot be displayed due to insufficient permission. Remove and reconnect your YouTube account on the integrations page.

youtube:ctr.exception: This metric cannot be displayed due to insufficient permission. Remove and reconnect your YouTube account on the integrations page.
